title: HOMESHOPA 40L Collapsible Laundry Basket, Grey Foldable Pop Up Storage Container/Organiser, Portable & Lightweight Washing Bin Tub, Comfortable Non-Slip Handles, Space Saving Bucket/Hamper
features: COLLAPSIBLE LAUNDRY BASKET - Our collapsible laundry tub is functional as well as stylish. The ideal laundry bin for keeping you organised. A perfect accessory for storing your preferred items. When not in use, this space-saving laundry basket simply folds flat for easy storage. A new favourite organisation accessory for your home!

DESIGNED TO LAST: This portable laundry basket is made of strong materials and folds up small for easy storage. This washing bin is extremely safe to use. Use them with confidence; this item is strong and long-lasting. The ventilation holes on the basket's sides are ideal for ventilating dirty or wet laundry while waiting between loads. You can expect to keep this baskets for years as it won’t be easily damaged.

HANDLES WITH COMFORT GRIP: This collapsible foldable storage bucket has been designed with your comfort in mind. The laundry bin has comfort grip handles that provide support for your hands while holding it. The grip handles are designed to provide comfort while carrying or transporting items from one location to another.

SPACE SAVING: A slim and sleek collapsible bin designed specifically for saving space. When you don't need the extra space, collapse this bin. Designed to save space and keep items as organised as possible. A multifunctional storage bin with the option of adjusting the size as needed. Sides are simple to collapse and store. Even when not in use, the walls and angles of this collapsible bin will always remain upright.

VERSATILE STORAGE BASKET - 40 litres laundry hamper is extremely versatile and can be used for a variety of other purposes around the house. Keep a few of our laundry bucket around the house to organize and store items such as children's toys, building blocks, towels, pet items, gardening accessories, and more!
Size: You will get 40 Litre collapsible laundry basket. Open size: 48 x 48 x 35cm & Folded size: 48 x 48 x 7cm
